description: Composition Cream kurta with self print, made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck with green lace detailing and purple and green tape detailing with sequin work, purple tape and green lace detailing along the short sleeve cuffs, lace and tape detailing along the empire waist and large print towards the hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by traditional Indian print and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The large print towards the hem adds zing to the garment. Team it with leggings or loose pyjamas and heeled sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
